name: Pathmark Local App Windows
release: v0.6.96 Project due dates and section fallback fixes
label: Project due dates and section fallback fixes
release_notes: Improves project due-date visibility, clarifies focus-block support structure, and adds safer fallbacks for Tasklist and Spending Plan section failures.
notes: Home now lets the Pathmark wordmark carry the brand; the standalone logo is no longer inserted above the seasonal banner.
Projects now show due-date visibility cards so overdue, due-soon and undated projects are easier to spot at a glance.
Focus-based projects show focus blocks with supporting time blocks nested directly beneath the block they support.
Supporting time blocks remain excluded from project completion while still syncing to Google Calendar and Google Tasks.
Tasklist now falls back to a simpler view if the richer hierarchy builder fails, rather than closing the whole section.
Spending Plan now opens even if starter-row checks or tabs fail, with developer diagnostics for the failing sub-section.
release_name: Project due dates and section fallback fixes
